title: eria ornata
intro: Eria ornata, also known as the golden orchid or golden eria, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Eria ornata include its potential to treat various health conditions such as skin infections, wounds, and fever, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce stress. Eria ornata can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
